title: Denebian holo-chess
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Denebian holo-chess''' was a form of [[Holochess/Legends|holochess]] often played in [[Casino/Legends|casinos]]. The [[Mantine Casino]] on board the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] had Denebian holo-chess among its games.

==Behind the scenes==
The reference to Denebian holo-chess was removed from [[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] when it was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Three]]''. It was replaced with [[Dejarik/Legends|Dejarik]].

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}}

===Non-canon appearances===
*<!-- 2013-10-11 -->''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]''
